## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs only

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include commands. -->

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `cd ui && npm test` passes (if UI changed)
- [ ] Relevant E2E specs run locally (list them):
- [ ] Manually verified in the dashboard / CLI (describe):

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, before/after screenshots help a lot. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [contributing setup](../blob/main/docs/contributing/setup.md) and [conventions](../blob/main/docs/contributing/conventions.md).
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): ...`).
- [ ] No secrets, no `.env`, no large binaries committed.
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/` if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] DB migration added under `internal/store/migrations/` if schema changed.
